zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Cecilia de Irmingland於1445年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可沙利頓時，她的父親Richard D’Irmingland23歲，母親Katherine Parton of Sharrington23歲。她於大約1470年與William Dabney在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1491年在英國英格蘭肯特澤文亞可斯享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Cecilia de Irmingland于1445年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可沙利頓时，她的父亲Richard D’Irmingland23岁，母亲Katherine Parton of Sharrington23岁。她于大约1470年与William Dabney在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1491年在英国英格兰肯特澤文亞可斯享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cecilia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

variants.name: Cecelia
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Cecilia de Irmingland was born in 1445, in Sharrington, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard D’Irmingland, was 23 and her mother, Katherine Parton of Sharrington, was 23. She married William Dabney about 1470, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1491, in Sevenoaks, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 46.

Elle a épousé William Dabney environ 1470, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1491, à Sevenoaks, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans.

ko.of, N., Burlingham, Norfolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 버링함 스트 앤드루
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Cecilia de Irmingland(이)가 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 샤링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard D’Irmingland(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Parton of Sharrington(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1470년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 William Dabney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1491년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 세베노크스에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Cecilia de Irmingland родилась в 1445 г. в местности шаррингтон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard D’Irmingland было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine Parton of Sharrington, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Dabney около 1470 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1491 г. в местности сивеноакс, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет.
